BoxCollider present, no Rigidbody. No UnityEvent m_Calls found on this component. To ignite automatically, ensure at least 2 neighbor Fire instances notify this fire as on (NotifyNeighborState(true) twice so onNeighbors>=2), which sets shouldTurnOn=true. After waiting up to 60s (plus buffer), the fire should set isOn=true and call UpdateFireState(true), playing ParticleSystem on mainEffectGo (fileID 1849464941111748095) and invoking FireController.Instance.FireChanged(1).

Extinguish via repeated water hits. Fire implements IWaterInteractable; WaterHit(Vector3 normal) must be invoked repeatedly such that each hit occurs within maxHitInterval (<=2s) to keep isTurningOff=true and accumulate currentHitTime until totalHitTime=5s, after which isOn=false and UpdateFireState(true) should play neighbor notifications and FireController.Instance.FireChanged(-1). Requires an external water system or EventTrigger to call WaterHit; no parameterless public methods are available on Fire, and no m_Calls are defined in the scene meta.
